beats.text: MESSI SCORED A STUNNING HAT-TRICK IN THE WIN
OUR LISANDRO PLAYED AS ARGENTINA KEPT A CLEAN SHEET
ARGENTINA ARE DEFENDING WORLD CHAMPIONS FROM 2022

caption: Lisandro Martinez was there as Messi wrote himself into the history books 🔴 Argentina crushed Algeria 3-0 in their World Cup opener — Messi with a stunning hat-trick for the defending champions. Our United centre-back helped keep a clean sheet and Carrick will have been watching with a big smile. Which United player are you most excited to watch at this World Cup? 👇 #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #worldcup #argentina #martinez
